sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's anti-martingale position multiplier derived from geometric mean of system performance coefficient (1.1475^0.5 = 1.071214264). Increase stake by this factor with each successive trade to compound returns geometrically. Optimal-f parameters (Kelly fraction, max drawdown tolerance) not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be increased with each successive trade to compound returns geometrically, multiplying final stake by the geometric mean factor for each trade opportunity.
